attributes.description: Alerts when swap usage exceeds an absolute byte threshold. Non-zero or rising swap indicates memory pressure spilling to disk and degrading performance.
attributes.name: [AWS RDS OTel] Swap usage high

investigation_guide.blob:
## Swap Usage High

### Triage
1. Check `FreeableMemory` — low freeable memory is the upstream cause.
2. Review `DatabaseConnections` for connection leaks or storms.
3. Inspect `CPUUtilization` — swap activity often correlates with CPU spikes.
4. Identify memory-heavy queries or large buffer pool misconfiguration.

### Mitigation
- Reduce connections or enable pooling.
- Scale up instance class for more RAM.
- Tune memory-related engine parameters appropriately for the instance size.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-aws.rds.otel-*
| WHERE Namespace == "AWS/RDS"
    AND MetricName == "SwapUsage"
    AND stat == "Average"
| STATS max_swap_usage = MAX(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/SwapUsage`)
    BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region
// Absolute bytes in swap — healthy instances stay near zero (default: 100 MB)
| WHERE max_swap_usage > 104857600
| SORT max_swap_usage DESC
